evidence_quotes.quote: The proposal would be an end-of-life plan, which may be in the form of private servers, peer-to-peer servers, or simply an offline mode, thus ensuring access to consumers who have paid for the product for the product in question.

paragraphs.text: Hello and thank you for your time. Like so many others, I would like to propose the inclusion of the protection of creative digital intellectual properties, such as video games, which are purchased by consumers and consumers at times being barred from access by the companies publishing the games. Or then those companies decide that gambling is no longer viable, and that is completely valid, no one is asking companies to lose money. The proposal would be an end-of-life plan, which may be in the form of private servers, peer-to-peer servers, or simply an offline mode, thus ensuring access to consumers who have paid for the product for the product in question. I would also like to propose a kind of Vault. A site where works of art and expression of digital content developers need to be archived so that it is not lost, as is the case so often, pieces of history and expression of people who often work years by wire, to see their name only on credits and their work through a publisher. A great thank you and a great job.
